hero.title: FRPD DataHub
hero.description: The central repository for high-fidelity economic data, longitudinal surveys, and interactive visualization tools designed to support evidence-based policy making.

resources.title: International Monetary Fund (IMF)
resources.description:
Global macroeconomic data (GDP, inflation, debt, fiscal data)
World Economic Outlook (WEO) database
Balance of payments, exchange rates, financial statistics
Best for: global macro & policy research

resources.title: World Bank Open Data
resources.description:
16,000+ development indicators
GDP, poverty, education, health, trade
Country comparison tools
Best for: development economics & cross-country analysis

resources.title: Federal Reserve Economic Data (FRED)
resources.description:
800,000+ time series
US GDP, inflation, unemployment, interest rates
Highly customizable charts & downloads
Best for: US macro + time-series econometrics

resources.title: OECD Data
resources.description:
Economic performance, productivity, taxation
Education, labour, and social indicators
Best for: advanced economies comparison

resources.title: United Nations Data
resources.description:
Global demographic, trade, and social indicators
SDGs (Sustainable Development Goals) data
Best for: global development & social stats

resources.title: Trading Economics
resources.description:
Real-time data for 200+ countries
GDP, inflation, interest rates, forecasts
Best for: quick dashboards + market updates

resources.title: Bank for International Settlements (BIS)
resources.description:
Banking system data, credit, global liquidity
Best for: financial stability & banking research

resources.title: Eurostat (EU Data)
resources.description:
EU-wide statistics (economy, labor, trade, inflation)
Best for: European Union comparisons

resources.title: World Development Indicators (WDI)
resources.description:
World Bank datasets with advanced filtering tools
Best for: academic research & panel datasets

resources.title: Our World in Data (OWID)
resources.description:
Clean visualized datasets (poverty, growth, inequality, energy)
Best for: charts + storytelling in research

resources.title: DBnomics (Multi-database aggregator)
resources.description:
Aggregation of millions of series from multiple providers
Best for: integrated economic modeling

resources.title: Kaggle Economic Datasets
resources.description:
Pre-cleaned CSV files for specialized training
“GDP dataset”, “inflation panel data”, etc.
Best for: machine learning + econometrics practice

resources.title: State Bank of Pakistan (SBP) EasyData
resources.description:
Comprehensive portal for Pakistan's monetary and financial statistics
Inflation, interest rates, exchange rates, and banking data
Best for: Pakistan-specific macro & monetary research

resources.title: Pakistan Bureau of Statistics (PBS)
resources.description:
National datasets on inflation (CPI), employment, and demographics
Household Integrated Economic Survey (HIES) reports
Best for: Pakistan development & social statistics

resources.title: Pakistan Econometric Python Toolbox
resources.description:
Custom scripts to download and clean data from IMF, FRED, and SBP
Ready-made panel datasets for thesis and academic research
Best for: PhD students & data analysts

resources.title: Proprietary Market Intelligence (2025)
resources.description:
High-frequency localized data on household spending patterns and urban economic expectations
Includes specialized datasets for 15 major urban centers
Best for: corporate strategy & investment research

resources.title: National Longitudinal Survey of Resilience
resources.description:
Comprehensive microdata from our 2024 survey of 10,000 households regarding horizontal coping mechanisms
Includes detailed demographics and income shock data
Best for: academic research & social policy design

resources.title: Interactive Economic Dashboard
resources.description:
Real-time visualization of key economic indicators including GDP growth, inflation (CPI), and unemployment rates.
Powered by automated data synchronization with national and international reporting bodies.
Best for: quick executive summaries & trend analysis

ui.noResults: No resources found matching your criteria.
ui.ctaDesc: Our data engineering team provides custom data procurement, cleaning, and advanced analytical services tailored to your specific research or policy objectives.

hero.title: مركز بيانات FRPD
hero.description: المستودع المركزي للبيانات الاقتصادية عالية الدقة، والمسوحات الطولية، وأدوات التصور التفاعلية المصممة لدعم صنع السياسات القائمة على الأدلة.

resources.title: صندوق النقد الدولي (IMF)
resources.description:
بيانات الاقتصاد الكلي العالمية (الناتج المحلي الإجمالي، التضخم، الدين، البيانات المالية)
قاعدة بيانات آفاق الاقتصاد العالمي (WEO)
ميزان المدفوعات، أسعار الصرف، الإحصاءات المالية
الأفضل لـ: أبحاث السياسات والماكرو العالمية

ui.noResults: لم يتم العثور على موارد تطابق معاييرك.
ui.ctaTitle: هل تحتاج إلى مجموعة بيانات متخصصة؟
ui.ctaDesc: يوفر فريق هندسة البيانات لدينا خدمات شراء البيانات وتنظيفها والتحليل المتقدم المخصصة لأهدافك البحثية أو السياسية المحددة.

hero.title: DataHub de la FRPD
hero.description: Le référentiel central pour les données économiques de haute fidélité, les enquêtes longitudinales et les outils de visualisation interactive conçus pour soutenir l'élaboration de politiques fondées sur des données probantes.

resources.title: Fonds monétaire international (FMI)
resources.description:
Données macroéconomiques mondiales (PIB, inflation, dette, données budgétaires)
Base de données des Perspectives de l'économie mondiale (PEM)
Balance des paiements, taux de change, statistiques financières
Idéal pour : recherche macroéconomique et politique mondiale

hero.title: FRPD DataHub
hero.description: Das zentrale Repository für hochpräzise Wirtschaftsdaten, Längsschnittumfragen und interaktive Visualisierungstools zur Unterstützung einer evidenzbasierten Politikgestaltung.

resources.title: Internationaler Währungsfonds (IWF)
resources.description:
Globale makroökonomische Daten (BIP, Inflation, Verschuldung, Finanzdaten)
Datenbank des World Economic Outlook (WEO)
Zahlungsbilanz, Wechselkurse, Finanzstatistiken
Am besten für: globale Makro- und Politikforschung

hero.title: FRPD 数据中心
hero.description: 高保真经济数据、纵向调查和交互式可视化工具的中央存储库，旨在支持循证政策制定。

resources.title: 国际货币基金组织 (IMF)
resources.description:
全球宏观经济数据（GDP、通货膨胀、债务、财政数据）
世界经济展望 (WEO) 数据库
国际收支、汇率、金融统计
最适合：全球宏观和政策研究
